title: Mission Control
business_purpose: Provide the noob-proof ERP shell, default dashboard, module launcher, session status, command palette, and notification shell region.
primary_user_context: An internal operator entering AKTI ERP through the local/demo shell.
user_goal: Understand where they are, what work areas are available, whether session is active, and what to do next.
success_outcome: User lands in a readable Mission Control shell with clear navigation, safe session state, and no raw technical leakage.

visibility_rules.description: Visible under current controlled local/demo access while final auth and permission surfaces remain future decisions.

record_scope_behavior.description: Mission Control content must remain scoped to the active organization and must not expose raw tenant identifiers to normal users.

data_sources.label: Mission Control navigation
data_sources.description: Defines sidebar, mobile drawer, bottom navigation, top utility bar, and approved destinations.

data_sources.label: Module list
data_sources.description: Reads available modules for read-only launcher/status display.

data_sources.label: Session state
data_sources.description: Derived from the existing operator-context.ts mechanism or approved successor without exposing raw token internals.

data_sources.label: Notification shell region
data_sources.description: Provides bell, unread badge shell, drawer, toast renderer, empty state, and static/demo/system notification rendering only.

api_routes.description: List available modules for read-only Mission Control display.

empty_data_behavior.title: No work ready yet
empty_data_behavior.message: Available work areas will appear here when your session and permissions allow them.

empty_state.title: Welcome to Mission Control
empty_state.message: Start by confirming your session, then choose an available work area.

permission_denied_state.title: Access needed
permission_denied_state.message: You do not have permission to open this work area.

degraded_mode_state.title: Limited diagnostics mode
degraded_mode_state.message: Some work areas are unavailable until your session is active.

desktop_layout.primary_navigation: Collapsible left sidebar with compact top utility bar

tablet_layout.primary_navigation: Collapsed sidebar or drawer with top utility bar

mobile_layout.primary_navigation: Hybrid drawer plus bottom primary navigation

forbidden_behaviors: Do not claim implementation from this planned contract.
Do not create a separate dashboard route unless a later approved decision selects one.
Do not create notification delivery, retention, mentions, WhatsApp, SMS, or email behavior.
Do not expose bearer token textareas, decoded token internals, actor IDs, org IDs, lead IDs, or raw technical session fields to normal operators.
Session indicators must be limited to session active, session missing, session expired/invalid, and limited diagnostics mode.
Advanced Diagnostics is the only approved Phase 4B surface for bearer token/session technical details.
Do not implement Foundry, module installer, platform AI runtime, new business modules, production launch, or real WhatsApp production behavior.
